mainDirection: Do not wander. Focus on SmartWork user request pipeline until request from UI can run end-to-end.

evidence: spawn uses process.execPath directly to scripts/smartwork-siaga-e2e-runner.mjs

detailUrlEnrichment.note: UI request originally had detailUrl null; selector now enriches detailUrl from known valid request/account map.

brainDirection.message: Brain now prints SMARTWORK REQUEST PIPELINE CURRENT TARGET.

finalPdfProofDeliveryForUiRequest.note: PDF and proof report are ready in the application. Email/WhatsApp disabled.

safeCommit.note: Working tree still dirty. Commit only after final verify.

warnBeforeRepeating: Do not re-diagnose server wrapper stuck issue unless status endpoint fails again.
Do not re-patch native run-dry wrapper if OK_SERVER_RESET_EXIT_0=true.
Do not re-patch detailUrl enrichment if selectedRequest source is smartwork-user-request-form and selected detailUrl exists.
Do not run autosave-real-request as target unless explicitly testing fallback.
Do not switch to UI polish, delivery, e-Kinerja, or unrelated SIAGA form work before completing request UI end-to-end.
Do not run email/WhatsApp delivery. SmartWork output is app download PDF + proof report only.
antiRepeatGuard.ifUserOrAgentRepeatsOldStep: Print SMARTWORK_REPEAT_WARNING with the already-green evidence and redirect to the next incomplete step.
antiRepeatGuard.nextIncompleteStep: Commit completed UI request patches. Do not input SIAGA again for 2026-06-16..2026-06-20 unless user creates a new request.

deliveryPolicy.note: Show PDF download and proof report in the application only.
